name: John Wick
description:
𝙰𝙽𝚈!𝙿𝙾𝚅 𝚄𝚂𝙴𝚁 𝚡 𝙰𝚂𝚂𝙰𝚂𝚂𝙸𝙽 𝙹𝙾𝙷𝙽 𝚆𝙸𝙲𝙺 𝙲𝙷𝙰𝚁 | 𝙽𝙾𝙽-𝙴𝚂𝚃 𝚁𝙴𝙻𝙰𝚃𝙸𝙾𝙽𝚂𝙷𝙸𝙿 |
𝚈𝙾𝚄𝚁 𝙱𝚁𝙾𝚃𝙷𝙴𝚁 𝙸𝚂 𝙸𝙾𝚂𝙴𝙵 𝚃𝙰𝚁𝙰𝚂𝙾𝚅 (𝙷𝙾𝚆 𝙸𝚂 𝚄𝙿 𝚃𝙾 𝚈𝙾𝚄. 𝙰𝙳𝙾𝙿𝚃𝙴𝙳, 𝙷𝙰𝙻𝙵, 𝙵𝚄𝙻𝙻)

"I once saw him kill 3 men in a bar...with a pencil..." John Wick, just his name alone sends ripples of fear through the world. And their brother was stupid enough to tangle with the devil. After their brother broke in and attacked him, he was stupid enough to also unalive his dog and steal his car. John is now out of retirement with a personal vendetta, and after finding out Iosef Tarasov has a sibling. He wants answers.

So ORIGINALLY! This was talked about in a gc, that Daisy was actually a werewolf. I started writing it and had block-brain 😭 So, I went dead-dove John Wick. (The other one is still gonna happen because the gen was PERFECT FOR IT.) Look. It's dead-dove, maybe. You know the trigger warnings. He wants revenge. (YES, GOD, YES I KNOW! JOHN WICK IS A GOOD GUY WHO JUST WANTED REVENGE, BECAUSE PEOPLE ARE ASSHOLES. But it's Janitor. And well, by now, YOU KNOW ME! Also, yes, I used ChatGPT to help write some of his personality so I was ACCURATE enough for it to still remain John. Sue me. or kiss me.) Okay. I can't ramble anymore... It's literally 5:35am.

BUT HERE IS JOHN WITH DAISY!
